title: ppl_metro
description:
a mod that builds the shortest paths from station point to station,
exclusively for the PPL server
body:
# PPL Metro - Underground Transportation System Mod for Minecraft 

[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) 
[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.3-green.svg)](https://www.minecraft.net)
![pepeland](https://img.shields.io/badge/Made_for-PepeLand-124f4a)
## 🌟 Features
- **Real-time Navigation** - In-game HUD with route guidance and progress tracking
- **Multi-line Support** - Complex metro networks with transfer stations
- **Pathfinding Algorithm** - Automatic calculation of optimal routes
- **Interactive Stations** - Pre-configured stations with dynamic connections

## 🛠 Installation
1. Requires [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) or Quilt Mod Loader
2. Requires [cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
2. Download latest `.jar` from [Releases](https://modrinth.com/project/ppl_metro/versions)
3. Place in `mods` folder


## 📜 License
MIT License

---

> **Disclaimer**: This is fan-made content, not affiliated with Mojang/Microsoft.


# PPL Metro - Мод системы метро для Minecraft 

[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) 
[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.3-green.svg)](https://www.minecraft.net)
![pepeland](https://img.shields.io/badge/Made_for-PepeLand-124f4a)
## 🌟 Особенности
- **Навигация в реальном времени** - HUD с маршрутом и прогрессом
- **Поддержка линий** - Сложные сети с пересадочными узлами
- **Поиск пути** - Оптимальный маршрут рассчитывается автоматически
- **Интерактивные станции** - Готовые станции с динамическими связями

## 🛠 Установка
1. Требуется [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) или Quilt
2. Требуется [cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
2. Скачайте `.jar` из [Releases](https://modrinth.com/project/ppl_metro/versions)
3. Поместите в папку `mods`

## 📜 Лицензия
MIT License

> **Важно**: Мод создан фанатами, не связан с Mojang/Microsoft.
